# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - auth.thirdparty.net
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-routes
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - auth.thirdparty.net
  gateways:
  - mesh # Applies to requests originating from within the mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - authority: api.thirdparty.com
      port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 5s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 2s
  - match:
    - authority: auth.thirdparty.net
      port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth.thirdparty.net
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-mysql
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.externaldb.com
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-postgresql
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.externaldb.net
  - 192.0.2.10 # Example of a static IP if known and preferred
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC # Use STATIC if using 'addresses' or a fixed IP is known
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  # addresses: # Uncomment and specify if using STATIC resolution with known IPs
  # - 192.0.2.10
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-routes
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.externaldb.com
  - postgres.externaldb.net
  gateways:
  - mesh # Applies to requests originating from within the mesh
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mysql.externaldb.com
        port:
          number: 3306
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.externaldb.net
        port:
          number: 5432
